description_long: This object is a large, robust rifle with a boxy receiver and a long, cylindrical barrel featuring segmented reinforcement rings. The body is predominantly matte black, with a solid, fixed stock at the rear and a prominent trigger guard beneath the receiver. The barrel extends straight from the receiver, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. There is a small, raised sighting element on top of the receiver, but no scope or advanced optics are present. The magazine is not externally visible, suggesting an internal or side-fed mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative features and a focus on durability and function.
description: A large, matte black rifle with a boxy receiver, long reinforced barrel, and fixed stock. It features a simple sight and lacks visible magazine or muzzle attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, long barrel, and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
